examples: Do you know what the acupuncturist did?
Make an appointment with an acupuncturist.
I am an acupuncturist and massage therapist.
In Taipei, an acupuncturist twirled her needles in my left knee to treat the pain in my right shoulder.
It found one in two Britons has visited an alternative health practitioner, such as an osteopath, aromatherapist or acupuncturist.
